data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for last-touch/first-touch policy fields.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the last-touch/first-touch policy fields, but the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or confirmations related to this requirement. The prior steps focus on other aspects of the saga, such as booking and financial outputs, without addressing the necessary policy fields. This indicates a lack of concrete evidence to support the validation of the requirement, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of last-touch/first-touch policy fields.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify last-touch/first-touch policy fields.
